name: H Mart Keeaumoku
tagline: Massive Korean grocery with an incredible hot food bar, live seafood counter, and Hawaii-exclusive frozen treats.
parking: Paid garage at Keeaumoku shopping area
talkStory: H Mart, founded in 1982 by Korean immigrant Il Yeon Kwon in Queens, New York, is now the largest Asian grocery chain in America. The Keeaumoku location caters to Honolulu's large Korean community with a hot food bar featuring restaurant-quality Korean fried chicken and tteokbokki. The banchan section is enormous and changes seasonally. Look for Hawaii-exclusive Korean ice cream bars in the freezer aisle. Weekday afternoons avoid the weekend crush of families doing weekly shopping.
